comment: Baseline count of files that legitimately still import @/lib/supabase-admin while the hook-migration PRs ship. The check:legacy-admin guard fails CI when currentCount > baseline.count OR any currently-importing file is not in baseline.files. Bump this file (or delete it along with src/lib/supabase-admin.ts once the count reaches zero).
files: src/hooks/useFarms.ts (anchor comment; the file no longer imports the symbol — kept as a sentinel until the count drops to 0)
